modules.title: Getting Started with CORTEX-SHELL
modules.overview: This is a template demo module. Replace with your own content by generating JSON materials.
learning_goals: Learn how to add your own content

content_blocks.text: Congratulations! Your CORTEX-SHELL is working. This is a demo module to show you how the content system works. Replace this with your own lecture materials by generating JSON modules using the CORTEX Pipeline.

key_points: Content is stored as JSON files
Generate content with the CORTEX Pipeline

glossary.meaning: A clean, reproducible shell template for the CORTEX medical education platform
